creator: nkoch@demig.de
text:
Created attachment 191898
dmesg.boot from 11.1-RELEASE/i386

I am trying to get FreeBSD 11-stable running on an embedded board equipped with Intel Atom E3825. 11.1-RELEASE/i386+amd64 boot but do not recognize the graphics hardware (valley-bridge, pci id 0xF31). 11.1-stable/i386+amd64 both hang immediately as long as I have kern.vty=vt.
I used the latest snapshots from ftp but there is no difference when using the latest GENERIC or MINIMAL kernel built from 11-stable sources.
